## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between TechBlocks and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered, expert-led content creation (5-8 articles/week) starting at $9k/month for editorial](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [TechBlocks seeks to scale content production, improve engagement, and enable sales with targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to a follow-up demo meeting to discuss GrowthX's capabilities tailored to TechBlocks' needs](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Deepak emphasized the importance of personalized, industry-specific content strategies in the next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Background and Offerings

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli (Bruno's brother) and Daniel Lopez](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Leverages AI workflows with expert oversight for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Primary services: editorial content, programmatic SEO, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Customers include Ramp and Reddit, used for scalability and targeted campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Achieved $3M revenue in first year, aiming for $20M this year](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### TechBlocks' Content Needs and Challenges

  - [Recently increased hiring for outreach and demand generation](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Seeking to scale content production and market presence](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Currently working with Neil Patel's agency for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Interested in creating engaging, persona-specific content for various industries](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Wants to enable sales team with relevant, timely content for prospects](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Content Strategy and Tools Discussion

  - [Deepak referenced past experience with Uberflip (now Pathfactory) for content curation](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Discussed potential for AI to create targeted content hubs based on sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Bruno highlighted GrowthX's ability to repurpose content (e.g., turning podcasts into blogs)](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of building domain authority through consistent content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Differentiation

  - [Focuses on outcome-based, problem-solving content rather than product-centric messaging](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows developed over 10,000+ hours of research and testing](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Employs multiple levels of human expertise to guide AI content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Aims to provide scalable, high-quality content production as an extension of client teams](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to research TechBlocks' website and offerings before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Bruno to send calendar invite for follow-up demo on Tuesday at 2:30 PM CT (3:30 PM ET)](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare tailored presentation addressing TechBlocks' specific industry focus and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Discuss potential strategies and demonstrate GrowthX's capabilities in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/mwyhLtLGdLb-B82gDd6Si_MUpzahvbxj?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
